title: Senior Software Engineer - BEL Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BEL Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
BEL Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
